title: Is there a way to get link to a Group?
excerpt: Would like to get link to the group in the board, is there any way to do this?

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to get link to the group in the board, is there any way to do this?

posts.author: kylecordes (Kyle Cordes)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t work at Monday, but…

I just looked through the structure of the page in the browser developer tools. There does not appear to be any suitable stable HTML ID that could be used to link this way. So monday’s core developers would need to add this capability.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey
What is it that you are trying to do exactly ?

You could create a view that is filtered to JUST show that group, and then share that URL?

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to add link into some documentation, so that the users are directly taken to the specific Group in the board.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: You should lodge this under feature requests.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah I see. The only way around this at the moment would be to create the link view, and use the URL from it.
But you are right, links to specific groups would be really useful, and shouldn’t be too hard as you can already link to items.
